assertion_results.text: Step 0 extracts the Deployment Context column from the Source Repositories table and parses rhtpa-backend as customer-shipped (§1.77)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md lines 36-44: 'Deployment Context Lookup' section extracts the Deployment Context column from the Source Repositories table, matches rhtpa-backend, and shows the table with Deployment Context = customer-shipped. Line 44 confirms: 'Deployment context: **customer-shipped**'.

assertion_results.text: Step 1 looks up the deployment context for the affected repository and records customer-shipped as part of the CVE metadata
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md (Step 1 -- Data Extraction) lines 36-44: 'Deployment Context Lookup' section looks up the deployment context for rhtpa-backend (the affected repository via pscomponent:org/rhtpa-server) and records 'customer-shipped' as part of the extracted CVE metadata.

assertion_results.text: Remediation task descriptions include a Coordination Guidance subsection in Implementation Notes with customer-shipped guidance text
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md contains four tasks, each with a '### Coordination Guidance' subsection under '## Implementation Notes': Task 1 (line 73), Task 2 (line 126), Task 3 (line 213), Task 4 (line 271). Each contains: 'This component is shipped to customers.'

assertion_results.text: The customer-shipped guidance mentions coordinating with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure
assertion_results.evidence: All four Coordination Guidance subsections contain the exact text: 'Coordinate with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure. Fix must be released via a security advisory with explicit CVE-to-component mapping.' This covers all three required elements: CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure.
